ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If the note doesn't exist when symbol linking, add an option to create the note.
ast.target: 如果在使用符号链接时笔记不存在，则添加一个创建该笔记的选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: e.g. é -> e when searching or creating links via the popup.
ast.target: 例如：在弹窗搜索或创建链接时，将 é 视为 e。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include link symbol prefix in display text
ast.target: 在显示文本中包含链接符号前缀

ast.target: 全局触发符号必须是单个字符。

ast.name: Notice

ast.name: text
ast.source: May be slower than the native popup.

ast.name: text
ast.source: When set above 0, you'll need to press escape, return/enter, or type over X spaces to close the popup.
ast.target: 当设置大于 0 时，您需要按下 Esc、回车或输入超过 X 个空格才能关闭弹窗。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Example: 'ad-note' will allow linking inside ```ad-note code blocks.
ast.target: 例如：输入 'ad-note' 将允许在 ```ad-note 代码块内进行链接。

regex.source: text: `E.g. [${this.plugin.settings.includeSymbol ? this.plugin.settings.globalTriggerSymbol : ""}evan](./evan)`
regex.target: text: `例如 [${this.plugin.settings.includeSymbol ? this.plugin.settings.globalTriggerSymbol : ""}evan](./evan)`

regex.source: text: `E.g. typing "${this.plugin.settings.globalTriggerSymbol}John Doe" will create "${this.plugin.settings.includeSymbolInNewFileName ? this.plugin.settings.globalTriggerSymbol : ""}John Doe.md"`
regex.target: text: `例如输入 "${this.plugin.settings.globalTriggerSymbol}张三" 将创建 "${this.plugin.settings.includeSymbolInNewFileName ? this.plugin.settings.globalTriggerSymbol : ""}张三.md"`
